scenes.text: Welcome to the world of Stickman adventures. Today we are going to explore something truly amazing and fun.
scenes.bg_prompt: A bright sunny park with green grass and blue sky, cartoon style

scenes.text: Look at this beautiful place. The trees are tall and the flowers bloom everywhere around us.
scenes.bg_prompt: A magical forest with colorful flowers and tall oak trees, cartoon style

scenes.text: That was a great journey. See you next time for more exciting adventures ahead.
scenes.bg_prompt: A sunset scene with orange and purple sky over rolling hills, cartoon style
